use_cases: Site-wide announcements for product launches or updates
Promotional banners for sales or special offers
Call-to-action banners driving users to new features
ai_summary: A lightweight announcement banner with centered text and an inline call-to-action link. Features a solid indigo background with white typography and hover states on the link. Designed for site-wide notifications like product updates, promotions, or important messages. Responsive layout adapts from mobile to desktop with centered alignment.
